premarket.market_expectations: A mixed but modestly positive setup: GIFT Nifty is a touch softer, but firm S&P and Nasdaq closes overnight and continued DII buying provide the tilt higher. Nothing in the cross-asset picture (yields, DXY, USD/INR) is moving enough to cast a vote either way, and VIX stays calm.

news.headline_reworded: Wall Street closes higher on cooling inflation data, lifting Asian futures
news.why_it_matters: Firm US closes are one of two positive votes feeding this morning's Mildly Long call.

news.headline_reworded: Domestic institutions add to auto and banking positions ahead of results season
news.why_it_matters: DII buying continues to be the more consistent domestic flow this week versus choppy FII activity.
